overall.description: Game engine footage from a flight simulator showing exploration of a twin-propeller aircraft, transitioning from the interior cabin and cockpit to external views on an airport tarmac. The camera moves through the aircraft interior before switching to an external free camera that orbits the plane and reveals the surrounding airfield with distant mountains.

events.description: moving from the passenger cabin into the cockpit area

agents.ego_description: walking through the aircraft interior from the rear cabin into the cockpit and examining the flight instruments and controls

entered.detail: interior passenger cabin with blue carpet and dark upholstered walls
flight control panel with multiple analog gauges and central GPS display screen
control yoke and steering column positioned in front of the pilot seats

segments.scene_description: The segment begins inside the aircraft's passenger cabin with blue carpeting, then transitions into the cockpit where the camera examines the detailed instrument panel, control yokes, and flight displays. The environment is enclosed and artificially lit, with no external visibility.

scene_state.functional_zone: aircraft exterior nose section on tarmac

events.description: transitioning from cockpit interior to external view of the aircraft nose and fuselage

agents.ego_description: switching to external camera view and moving upward along the aircraft fuselage to examine the exterior

entered.detail: white aircraft fuselage with red and blue stripes running along the side
black propeller blade attached to the engine nacelle

segments.scene_description: The camera transitions from the cockpit to an external view, ascending along the aircraft's nose section. The bright midday sun illuminates the white fuselage with red and blue stripes, and the propeller comes into view against a clear blue sky.

events.description: circling around the aircraft to view the engines, propellers, and landing gear from multiple angles

agents.ego_description: circling around the parked aircraft to inspect the propellers, engine nacelles, and landing gear from various angles

entered.detail: front landing gear wheel and strut assembly
starboard wing extending from the fuselage with navigation lights

segments.scene_description: The camera circles around the aircraft on the concrete tarmac, examining the spinning propellers, engine details, and landing gear. The fuselage shifts from center to the left of the frame as the camera moves to capture the starboard wing and front nose section.

scene_state.functional_zone: airport apron with multiple parked aircraft

events.description: pulling back to reveal the wider airport environment with distant parked aircraft and mountain range

agents.ego_description: pulling back from the aircraft to survey the surrounding airport tarmac and other parked planes in the distance

notable_agents.action: small red and white single-engine aircraft parked on the tarmac

entered.detail: small red and white single-engine aircraft parked on the distant tarmac
gray twin-engine aircraft parked near the runway
mountain range visible on the horizon under the clear sky

segments.scene_description: The camera pulls back to reveal the wider airport environment, showing the main aircraft moving out of frame as the view expands to include other parked aircraft on the tarmac. A red and white plane sits to the left, a gray aircraft to the right, and distant mountains frame the horizon under the bright midday sun.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from the enclosed, artificial light of an aircraft interior to a wide, sun-drenched view of an airport tarmac. It begins inside the passenger cabin with blue carpeting before gliding into the cockpit to examine the detailed instrument panel and control yokes. The camera then shifts from the interior to the exterior, ascending along the white fuselage with red and blue stripes as the bright midday sun and a clear blue sky emerge. The scene expands as the camera circles the aircraft on the concrete tarmac, capturing the spinning propellers and landing gear before the fuselage shifts to the left of the frame. Finally, the view pulls back to reveal the broader airfield, moving past other parked red, white, and gray aircraft toward a horizon framed by distant mountains.
